text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, while Buena Vista and I are out shopping for training equipment…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Hm? …What's that over there?

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text: Step right up! Our New Year's Grand Raffle is underway! The grand prize is a hot spring vacation!

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text: First prize is a premium carrot hamburger steak! Second prize is a mountain of carrots! Third prize is one whole carrot!

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text: Come on, come on! Everyone's welcome!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Wow, a hot spring trip…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Our families used to go on trips together, remember?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: If we won… do you think we could all go again?
choice_data_list: Want to give it a try?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We'd received a raffle ticket from our shopping earlier. As I start to hand it to Buena…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: In that case… Would you spin it with me, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Yeah. If we're doing it together…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: I feel like we can win anything.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Buena Vista gently places her hand over mine… Together, we excitedly spin the raffle wheel!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The result is…

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text: Oh my! Congratulations!! We've got a winner!! The grand prize, a hot spring vacation!!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Trainer… We won!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: A hot spring trip…!!

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text: H-Hey… are those tears!? Did you want it that badly? But why…?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Sniff… Because… I thought the people I care about would be so happy…

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text: My goodness… Those tears… All because you wanted to make the people you care about happy…! Sob…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …Y-You're crying… for my sake?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: You're… so kind…
choice_data_list: (This is turning into a very strange feedback loop…)

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry about earlier…
choice_data_list: I'm glad you've calmed down. Shall we go?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …Doesn't that bother you, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: My emotions get carried away so easily. Don't you think I'm childish?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …I know. But sometimes… I wonder if I'm just… a little too emotional.
choice_data_list: It just means you have a big heart. There's nothing strange about that.
It just means you have a big heart. There's nothing strange about that.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Trainer…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …But, that's not what I…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: No… it's nothing.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: More importantly, about the trip… Our schedule's probably too busy right now.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: I want to stay focused for a while longer… Would you hold onto the ticket for me, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: When things finally settle down… let's all go together. Just like we used to!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I'm looking forward to it! Until then… let's keep doing our best.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: As I carefully tuck away the hot spring voucher, I make a mental note to invite Buena and her family once racing settles down.

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text: Congratulations! First prize! You've won our Premium Carrot Hamburger Steak!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: First prize! We got first prize! I knew having you with me would make all the difference, Trainer♪
choice_data_list: Come on, that was your good luck.
Come on, that was your good luck.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Nope! It was definitely because of you!

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text: Hahaha! You two really get along. You're just like siblings.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …Um, that means… I'm the little sister… right?

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text: Of course! I mean, if I had an adorable little sister like you, I'd have something to look forward to every day.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …Right. The little sister…

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The following afternoon, Buena tells me she's prepared lunch, so I head over to meet her.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Ta-da! I've turned the premium hamburger steak into a Grown-Up's Lunch!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: You know how there's a Kid's Lunch? I wanted to make an adult version!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: I picked more refined side dishes and seasoned everything a little more elegantly.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: I'm sure it'll suit your tastes too, Trainer! …I'll have the same as you, okay?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Munch… Mm! It's delicious♪ It really has a nice grown-up feel to it!

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text: Second prize!! A mountain of carrots!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Wow, that's so many! Everyone in the shopping district is incredibly generous!

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text: Haha, we just want everyone to have a good time! Hope you enjoy them, Buena!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: I will! I'll share them with all my friends♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She has no shortage of friends. As I picture all the different faces that might show up… the next day arrives.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Everyone, thank you so much for coming to my Carrot Party♪

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: I made lots of food, so please make yourselves at home and enjoy!

text_block_list.name: Gentildonna
text_block_list.text: What an honor to receive your invitation. To think I'd have the privilege of sharing a meal with such distinguished guests… don't you think?

text_block_list.name: Dream Journey
text_block_list.text: Indeed. Buena, your ability to bring people together is truly remarkable.

text_block_list.name: Transcend
text_block_list.text: Wooow… This is so hype.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Now then! Let's all gather around the table… and enjoy ourselves together♪

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text: Third prize! One carrot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text: Sorry about that, Buena… Wish I could've given you more.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Not at all! That's just how raffles go. Besides, look how shiny and fresh it is♪

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Trainer, want to split it with me?

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text: Hold on! If that's the case, let me work a little magic first!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Hehe, it looks even tastier now!
choice_data_list: This kind of reminds me of the summer festival when we were kids.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: It does! Hey, do you remember? That time the chocolate bananas sold out right before we got there…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: And then the vendor improvised and made us chocolate-covered pineapple instead. We shared that too, didn't we?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Sharing that single carrot between us… we spend the rest of the afternoon reminiscing about old memories.

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text: Sorry! No luck this time! Here's your participation prize, a pack of tissues!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Whaaat!? Aww…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …Even though you helped me, Trainer…
choice_data_list: Guess I wasn't much help after all.
Guess I wasn't much help after all.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: No! That's not true! You always help me!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: So if anyone came up short… it was me…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …Sniff. Maybe… I just don't have the kind of luck someone like you deserves.
choice_data_list: (…What kind of luck is that supposed to be?)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Drawing the losing ticket leaves Buena visibly crestfallen.
